verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will live my life in the shadow Of Your lovely face L will lift my voice to extol Your tender mercy and Your grace I cannot live without Your love Oh Lord I cannot breathe without Your breath I cannot sing without Your song Oh Lord Ringing deeply in my breast

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where can I go From Your presence Lord You are with me All of my days In my deepest despair To the highest place I will remain Here in the shadow of Your face
